name: Risk X-Ray
blurb: Reveals each featured stream's exact risk speed and a live estimate of how many ticks until it breaks TOS.

name: Auto-Pull Bot
blurb: Automatically yanks any featured stream the instant it crosses 90% risk — no more late-night reflex tests.

name: PR Firm on Retainer
blurb: Spin doctors quietly bleed off regulator heat every tick, making audits far rarer.

name: Sixth Slot
blurb: Bribe IT for one more front-page slot. More streams featured, more engagement — and more to babysit.
